Sort alternatives by descending score with tie-breaking

rank_by_scores.Rd

Produces a full ordering of all alternatives from a numeric score vector.

Usage

rank_by_scores(
  scores,
  tie_break = "smallest_index",
  stream_manager = NULL,
  stream_name = NULL
)

Arguments

scores

Numeric vector of scores (one per alternative, any order).

tie_break

"smallest_index" (default) or "random".

stream_manager

A StreamManager object; required when tie_break = "random".

stream_name

Character. Named stream for randomness.

Value

Integer vector of 1-based alternative indices, best (highest score) first.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Rank 3 alternatives by score: alt3 wins, alt1 second, alt2 last.
rank_by_scores(c(1.5, 0.5, 2.0))  # c(3, 1, 2)
} # }
